info.name: DMS Auth APIs
info.description:
Authentication APIs for the DMS platform.

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Initial Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `base_url` | `http://localhost:3001/api` | API base URL |
| `access_token` | — | Auto-populated from login/register response |
| `refresh_token` | — | Auto-populated from login response |
| `otp` | — | OTP received (manually set from DB or email) |

request.description:
Register a new company and user (self-onboarding).

Returns `nextStep: "VERIFY_EMAIL"` — an OTP is automatically sent to the registered email.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Registration successful. Please verify your email.",
  "companyId": "uuid",
  "userId": "uuid",
  "companyUserId": "uuid",
  "nextStep": "VERIFY_EMAIL"
}

response.name: Weak Password

request.description:
Authenticate with email or username.

On success, `access_token` and `refresh_token` are auto-saved as collection variables.

response.name: Success (Single Company)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "accessToken": "jwt...",
  "refreshToken": "jwt...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "user": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "email": "john@acme.com",
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "displayName": null
  },
  "companies": [
    {
      "companyId": "uuid",
      "companyCode": "CMP000001",
      "legalName": "Acme Corp",
      "displayName": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd",
      "isDefault": true
    }
  ],
  "defaultCompany": {
    "companyId": "uuid",
    "companyCode": "CMP000001",
    "legalName": "Acme Corp",
    "displayName": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd",
    "isDefault": true
  },
  "requiresCompanySelection": false
}

response.name: Success (Multi Company)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "accessToken": "jwt...",
  "refreshToken": "jwt...",
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "user": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "email": "john@acme.com",
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "displayName": null
  },
  "companies": [
    {
      "companyId": "uuid",
      "companyCode": "CMP000001",
      "legalName": "Acme Corp",
      "displayName": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd",
      "isDefault": true
    },
    {
      "companyId": "uuid",
      "companyCode": "CMP000002",
      "legalName": "Beta LLC",
      "displayName": "Beta LLC",
      "isDefault": false
    }
  ],
  "defaultCompany": {
    "companyId": "uuid",
    "companyCode": "CMP000001",
    "legalName": "Acme Corp",
    "displayName": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd",
    "isDefault": true
  },
  "requiresCompanySelection": true
}

response.name: Account Locked

query.description: Verification purpose (REGISTER, LOGIN, RESET_PASSWORD, CHANGE_EMAIL, INVITE)

request.description:
Send a verification OTP to the given email.

OTP is valid for 15 minutes, max 5 attempts, max 3 resends.

The OTP is stored as a SHA-256 hash — check the DB (`email_verification_tokens` table) to retrieve it during development.

response.name: Success

request.description: Resend a verification OTP (max 3 resends allowed). Invalidates the previous pending OTP.

response.name: Success
Too Many Resends

request.description:
Verify an email with the OTP received.

> **Note:** Set the `otp` collection variable manually after retrieving it from the `email_verification_tokens` table.
> ```sql
> SELECT otp FROM email_verification_tokens WHERE email = 'john@acme.com' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
> ```
> The OTP is SHA-256 hashed in the DB — this is the raw 6-digit OTP sent to the user.

response.name: OTP Expired
Too Many Attempts
